dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: THE COUNTER-SECRET POLICE COVER OPERATION

dialogue.name: Instructor (Math)
dialogue.speech: Now, who can answer this question?

dialogue.name: Instructor (Math)
dialogue.speech: Miss Anya Forger.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Three-thirds!

dialogue.name: Instructor (Math)
dialogue.speech: Ah. That is quite wrong.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: So, how are things going, Twilight?

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: How is your daughter doing with her academics?

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: HQ was estimating that she'd be able to receive eight Stella in about four months.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Four...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Not a problem.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: I see... that your ability to lie has diminished.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm confident she'll be able to get eight Tonitrus Bolts in two months, though.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: No matter.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: By the way...

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Our informant within city hall was compromised this morning.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: The enemy is stepping up their game.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Be on your guard, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: I shouldn't have to say this about being in the city,

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: but be it at Eden College or elsewhere,

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: you never know where eyes will be watching you.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: This country's counter-intelligence agency is quite tough.

dialogue.name: Hayward
dialogue.speech: H-How can I help you gentlemen?

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: We're with the State Security Service.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You're Jim Hayward, are you not?

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: We're taking you in on suspicion of being a spy.

dialogue.name: Hayward
dialogue.speech: A s-spy?! What are you talking about?

dialogue.name: Hayward
dialogue.speech: Hey... wait!

dialogue.name: Hayward
dialogue.speech: Stop that! Unhand me at onc—

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: We'll hear what you have to say back at the office.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: That's totally what happened this morning! I was so scared!

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: The guy they took from finance

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: was apparently leaking documents from this office.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, he must be a bad person.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Mornin'.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Oh, mornin'!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Good morning, Camilla.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Oh, by the way, Yor, my boyfriend told me about your marriage.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You haven't even told your younger brother yet?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, you're right! I'd completely forgotten!

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: Uh, you forgot? For a whole year?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Wh-What shall I do?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: He said he'll be calling you here later.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: That's right.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I haven't given him the number for my new place yet.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I was so relieved our marriage went throughthat I blanked on everything else!

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Say... is your younger brother a hottie?

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Aw, he's a total cutie!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes. Yuri is quite adorable.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: He would always call me "Sis" and refused to leave my side.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: The State Security Service

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Yikes, so he's obsessed with his sister. Pass.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: If your brother looks up to you so much,isn't it kinda mean to forget to tell him that?

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Let's start one more time from the beginning.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: How many and what kind of files did you take from city hall?

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Who did you sell them to?

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: What do they look like?What is their contact information?

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: When, where, and how many times did you meet with them?

dialogue.name: Hayward
dialogue.speech: Please let me go home.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The State Security Service.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: An organization whose goal is to maintain the peace within their nation.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Since we're both so good at talking, let's continue, Mr. Hayward.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Its main duties include spy hunting and keeping an eye on the citizens.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: What do you say?

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: To complete their missions, they frequently use violence,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: wiretapping, intimidation, and t*rture.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The citizens called them the "secret police," and they are feared.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Great work, First Lieutenant. The boss asked me to take over the questioning.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: All right. I'll leave the rest to you,

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Second Lieutenant Briar.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Yes, sir! I'll do my best!

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Yuri Briar, age twenty.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: He is a member of the secret police.

dialogue.name: Second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Why did the boss bring such a softie into our team?

dialogue.name: Second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: I admit that he's good, but frankly, he's just a kid.

dialogue.name: Second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Some elite from the Ministry of ForeignAffairs who quickly rose up the ranks.

dialogue.name: First lieutenant
dialogue.speech: When I talked to the boss...

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Huh? Well, isn't Yuri adorable?

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: He's like some cute little puppy.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: And that was all.

dialogue.name: Second Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: I-I see...

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Well, our organization needs a kid like him sometimes.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Not to mention, he knows how to do the job,

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: and he can be quite indiscriminate.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Hello, Mr. Hayward!

dialogue.name: Hayward
dialogue.speech: You won't get anything out of m—

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: My older sister actually works at city hall just like you do!

dialogue.name: Hayward
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Maybe you know her. She's pretty and kind, and I'm super proud of her!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm actually going to celebrate her marriage today.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I haven't seen her in forever, so I'm really excited!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: So, yeah. I'd like to get this over with quickly so I can go home.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Why don't you just spit it all out already?

dialogue.name: Hayward
dialogue.speech: I-I don't know anything!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Here are photos of your deals.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: This is you, isn't it, Mr. Hayward?

dialogue.name: Secretary
dialogue.speech: Second Lieutenant, you—

dialogue.name: Secretary
dialogue.speech: How long were you holding on to important evidence like this?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, I'm sorry. I forgot to submit them.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: You'd be much better off if you were honest.

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: So, I was just giving them the papers in exchange for cash.

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: All I know about him is that he's from the West. I don't even know his name.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Was there anything awkward about this man's looks or speech?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Perhaps he didn't act his age?

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: No, nothing like that.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I see. In that case...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Does the name "Twilight" sound familiar to you?

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: Who?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: He's a spy from the West. Apparently, a master of disguise.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: He is the villain who is trying to make this world fall into chaos.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: You could call him my natural enemy.

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: I-If I helped you catch him, could we just forget about all this?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Do you know something?

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: Er, no, but let me remember...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: If you feed me false information, you'll be committing another crime, so do be careful.

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: I just wanted extra money so I could fool around with girls! I didn't mean any harm.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: You have a wife, don't you?

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: You're a man, too! You must understand!

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: I was just selling some documents. I'm no political criminal.

dialogue.name: Heyward
dialogue.speech: Let me off the hook! Please!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Mr. Hayward, you see...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I haven't told my sister that I work for the State Security Service.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: It's a particularly dangerous job, so it'd just worry her.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: And above all, I don't want her to know how much dirty work I do.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Mr. Hayward, what you've done is treason.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Perhaps they were nothing more than pieces of paper to you,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: but they may very well put many of our citizens in danger.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Do you understand?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Unlike you, I love my family... my sister.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I will do anything to protect this country where my sister lives.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: And I do mean anything.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: I don't care how much you t*rture me!

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: I will never... sell out my friends!

dialogue.name: Enemy
dialogue.speech: Curse you and your resilience, Bondman!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If only she could concentrate on her studies like this.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: I only have two b*ll*ts left.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: How many b*ll*ts can Bondman's p*stol hold?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hm? I'm pretty sure it was eight.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: So that's two-eighths!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes! You're right!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: He has two-eighths of his b*ll*ts left!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How do you even know those words?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So the cartoon makes things easier for her to understand?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Th-Th-Th-Th-There's trouble, Loid!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Welcome home, Yor.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: He has two-eighths of his b*ll*ts left!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yuri... I mean, my younger brother is coming here today!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Today?!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So, yes...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: He insists on coming over and congratulating us.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What shall we do? He won't find out that this marriage is fake, will he?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Don't worry.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've prepared lovey-dovey couple accessories for just this sort of occasion.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa and Mama are flirting.

dialogue.name: Loid and Yor
dialogue.speech: We are not!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama's little brother still isn't here?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You mean your uncle.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Unkie...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's late. You should go to bed.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya will greet Unkie, too...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It appears as though he's still stuck at work.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I got a little worked up, and now I'm late.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Ah, but...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'll finally be able to see Sis! It's been so long! La, la!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Hurgh!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I can feel the ribs that my sister broke before tingling.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm remembering her loving embrace, and now my whole body is tingling!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: But why in the world did my sister wait a whole year to tell me she was married?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Could he be some foul villain that she's afraid of introducing to me?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I will eliminate every threat within this country where my sister lives.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: That includes her husband, too.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Loid Forger...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: If he's some shithead who's threatening my sister, I'll throw him in a cell immediately.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: No, calm down. She mustn't find out about my job.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: In order to protect my job and my happiness,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I must make sure she never finds out about this!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yuri Briar...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The Forgers' only blood relative.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's easy to slip up around someone you'reemotionally close to. We must be careful.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I cannot lose this family that I've worked so hard to create.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Everyone has a side they don't show anyone else.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: To their friends, their significant others, or even their families.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Hello! It's nice to meet you! I'm Yor's younger brother, Yuri!

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: They hide what they're truly feeling through fake smiles or bravado,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: and keep their true identities secret.

dialogue.name: Loid and Yor
dialogue.speech: Welcome.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: That is how the world keeps up the appearance of its temporary peace.

dialogue.name: Announcer
dialogue.speech: Foreign Minister Windsor met with Westalis's Foreign Minister Brantz for six days of talks,

dialogue.name: Announcer
dialogue.speech: with the goal of normalizing diplomatic relations between the two countries.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm going to find out...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm going to find out...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: if this man is going to harm our family or not!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: if this man is worthy of my sister or not!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: No, of course he's not worthy.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, let me take your coat and the things you're carrying.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, no, there's no need. Thank you for offering.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I can prepare something simple for us to eat pretty quickly.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The two of you can go ahead and relax.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, don't mind me.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I would never eat something you've made.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, you look so scary, Yuri.You must be nervous.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I-I'm not...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Crap. My animosity must've been showing.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Please, make yourself at home.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I could still be worked up from that interrogation earlier.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I need to play the part of the studious civil servant in front of my sister!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I need to play the part of the lovely wife in front of Yuri!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I could never tell him that I got married so I could continue k*lling!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you for the flowers, Yuri.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sure... But, Sis...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I haven't accepted your marriage yet.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Why did you keep this a secret for a year?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: How am I supposed to accept it if you don't explain?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A reasonable question.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now, then...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: About your brother... Why don't we just go ahead and tell him everything?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The fact that single women are seen as highly suspicious

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: is a very serious issue in our times.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sure your brother will understand.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: W-We can't!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: My brother can be very, er, sensitive.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If he found out that I... I got married to someone I wasn't in love with,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: he would probably lose his composure.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Then we could end up troubling you, Loid...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: And I don't want my brother to have to worry about me over something like this.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, b-but don't worry! I have the perfect excuse to give him!

dialogue.name: flashback Yor
dialogue.speech: I know more about Yuri than anyone else, so leave this to me!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm counting on you, Yor.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Well, Sis? Why didn't you tell me?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: W-Well...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: B-Because I completely forgot!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Huh? Okay, uh, I...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It completely slipped my mind!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Actually, when I called you the other day, you told me that you had a partner.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: You could've at least told me then!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: W-Well...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I forgot that I had forgotten to tell you about my marriage!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Well, if you say so, it must be true! Sorry, Sis.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He accepted that?!

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: When it concerns his sister, this man's sense of logic goes out the window.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Jeez, Sis! You're such a scatterbrain!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is this normal for the Briars?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sorry to keep you waiting.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Tch. How dare you interrupt the fun Sis and I were having?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: No... If I keep up this nasty attitude, Sis might end up hating me.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I need to at least fake—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Isn't Loid's cooking just so delicious?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Hmph! Don't think your cooking is enough to win me over, you villain!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, right. I actually brought over some wine.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Please, help yourselves.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How considerate of you.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'll get you drunk and expose you for the filthy villain you are!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: None for you tonight, Yor.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I know.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Unfortunately.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: So where did you two meet?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: At the boutique on rd Street.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It was so surprising for a man I didn't know to stare at me like that.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, well... She was just so beautiful, you know...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The way you said that...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This subject will probably lead to a slip-up. I need to change it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: After a few dinners, we realized we had a lot in common.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: When were these dinners? Where? How many times did you go?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Which restaurants?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: How many encounters led to your courtship?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: What made you decide to marry her?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Um...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why do I feel like I'm being questioned by an officer?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: How do the two of you address each other?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Huh? Er, I call her "Yor."

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: "Yor"?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Even I hesitate to use her given name!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: S-S-S-Sis, you don't happen to call him "Loi Loi" or "Loidy," do you?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? Um...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Loidy!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: God damn it!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-I just... call him Loid!

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: When it concerns his sister, this man's sense of logic... Well, you know the rest.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you all right?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Here, have some water.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: What could my sister possibly like about this guy?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Just because he can cook a little, and he's handsome, and tall,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: and considerate, and a doctor, that's just...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: That's just...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: God damn it!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yuri, calm down.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess neither Briar holds their liquor well.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: By the way, Yuri, I hear you're a diplomat.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Divert, divert...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's quite the line of work. Yor loves to brag about you all the time.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Dominic told me the other day that you went all the way to Hugaria recently.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Huh? Yeah. I mean, it's just work.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: But yes. It was a beautiful city.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I wish I could've shown you, Sis.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: There were a lot of cafés, too.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: There was even an old one that an empress used to frequent...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You mean in the capital city Obda, right?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There are several delicious restaurants there.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I went there when I was a medical student.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, really?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I went to Kalpatia often.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: The old man who owns it makes a superb stew.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I had that, too! Ah...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So this wine is also from Hugaria. It's excellent.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, that...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "I bought it from a shop on Hedger Street."

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I found it at a little shop on Hedger Street.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It must've been pricey.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's dalc.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, no. It was just around dalc.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I knew it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's plenty fancy. Thank you very much.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This conversation...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's right out of the Ostanian Intelligence Agency's manual for the art of deception.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's a conversation template used to fabricate a story about going to another country.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Meaning this whole story's been a lie.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Besides, the owner of Kalpatia now has his son running the shop.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And this wine actually costs dalc now due to a poor harvest.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You may be able to fool an amateur, but it won't work on me,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yuri Briar!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I had my reservations as soon as I heard you worked for the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That line of work has commonly been an entryway to espionage.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I had Franky do some digging,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and there are records showing he worked in that department up until a year ago.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He must've been scouted by the intelligence agency right before or after that.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Putting all the pieces together,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: this man works for the domestic counter-intelligence agency

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: that is WISE's mortal enemy... the secret police!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That said, though it may be dangerous,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: as long as he doesn't find out who I really am,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: maintaining this relationship isn't a bad idea.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If I play my cards right, he could be a powerful source of information

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: regarding my enemies.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll get you something in return next time.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Isn't it wonderful that you have such a lovely older brother now, Yuri?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He appears to be concealing his identity from Yor, too.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He may be easier to manipulate than I thought.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yuri?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I told you I wouldn't accept him, Sis!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm never going to call him my brother!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You're being rude, Yuri.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Yeah, you're right.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I went out into the world, made a name for myself,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: and I can even buy expensive booze now!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: But that's all because of my sister!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Our parents were gone, and we were poor,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: so we couldn't even get everything I'd need for studying.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: But...

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sis sure is late. She's still at her part-time job?

dialogue.name: Young Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm home, Yuri!

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: Uh, Sis?!

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: What happened?! You're covered in blood!

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: What kind of work were you doing?!

dialogue.name: Young Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? Oh, I'm totally fine.

dialogue.name: flashback Young Yor
dialogue.speech: This isn't my blood, so...

dialogue.name: Young Yor
dialogue.speech: More importantly, look, Yuri!

dialogue.name: Young Yor
dialogue.speech: Ta-da! It's the encyclopedia set you wanted!

dialogue.name: Young Yor
dialogue.speech: I got paid a lot this time, so I went ahead and bought it!

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sis...

dialogue.name: flashbackYoung Yor
dialogue.speech: Ta-da! Here are those snacks you wanted, Yuri!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Sis would always work herself to death for me!

dialogue.name: flashbackYoung Yuri
dialogue.speech: You don't have to work anymore, Sis!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: So I made up my mind... that I was going to become a proper adult,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: and be a man who could protect my sister.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm going to be the one who protects my one and only family member.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Can you even imagine

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: how it feels for me to have the most important person in my life

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: just suddenly taken from me by some guy who appeared out of thin air?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yuri...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sure, I wanted you to get married someday and find true happiness.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: But that guy has to be someone who could protect you even better than me!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Are you saying you're up to that task,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Loidy?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Lo—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I just want to put my brother's mind at ease.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I love Yor as much as you do, if not more!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: My daughter loves Yor very much, too.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Come on... This is just an act to deceive my brother.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She is already a part of my family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Even if spears or meteors rained down from the sky,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I would risk my life to protect her.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: This man was a bold liar.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Did he say... meteors?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm confident that I could protect her from spears, but meteors?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Is he surprisingly powerful? But how would he do that?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I-It's easy to claim such things, you liar!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Yeah! You have the face of a liar!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, goodness.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You're so careless sometimes, Yuri!

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: I have the face of a liar? Has he seen through me?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, don't worry about it, Yor. I'll clean it up.

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: No, that couldn't be.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: What? You've been married for a year,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: and that's your reaction when your hands touch?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: What? Are you actually married?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wha—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wh-What are you talking about?We're so in love.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Y-Yes, exactly.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: A likely story... If you're really married, then prove it to me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I mean, we have our marriage license...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: That's not what I meant!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Kiss right here and now.

dialogue.name: Yor and Loid
dialogue.speech: Huh?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Should be easy if you're actually in love.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Er... But if it's in front of someone...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Just once is fine. Then I'll believe you.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: If you can't, I'm going to city hall to have them revoke your marriage license!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is bad. What should I do?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, calm down.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm Westalis's greatest spy, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've had relations with countless women on my missions.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If a kiss or two will keep my mission safe...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If that's all it takes...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What?!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid, wait...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm just going to do what I always do, Yor.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come on.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I mean, we need to so we can keep our fake marriage going, but...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Wha...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Wha...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What?!

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: SHOW OFF HOW IN LOVE YOU ARE
